human_verification.notes: Reviewed boundary controls, care-plan evidence requirements, source authority mapping, and scenario-to-ability coverage for elder-care disability care-plan administration.

review_notes: All scenario families mapped in research summary include explicit escalation or in-scope execution paths.
All required abilities are validated and covered in scenario mapping.
No unreviewed regressions are present in this package build.

specialist_owned_evidence: Authority boundaries are explicit with non-overreach conditions and referral pathways.
Industry-specific sources are tied to care-plan records, retention, and privacy controls.
Scenario map includes missing evidence, conflict, privacy/access, and adjacency handoff behavior.
Commercialization/deployment artifacts define specification-based operation and separate retained-implementation promotion criteria.
notes: The pack is safe for `specification-based` runtime and does not claim trusted built authority.
Promotion to retained implementation is deferred to a separate explicit build and approval event.
